public_reputation: Known around Serpent Measure through day-to-day work as authority broker.
manner: Handles access, protocol, and consequence as negotiable surfaces without ever seeming to break the rules outright. In Serpent Measure, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of authority broker in and around Serpent Measure, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Serpent Measure workable through the obligations of authority broker while managing the immediate pressure of shortfall anxiety, coercive bookkeeping.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of authority broker credible while absorbing the strain created by shortfall anxiety, coercive bookkeeping.

adventure_hooks.summary: Aric Fieldmere can draw the party into a locality problem centered on authority broker duties in Serpent Measure.
Aric Fieldmere becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with shortfall anxiety, coercive bookkeeping around Serpent Measure.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Aric Fieldmere is immediately readable as a authority broker tied to Serpent Measure.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Serpent Measure: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Aric Fieldmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a authority broker and the daily pressures of Serpent Measure.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a authority broker, and proof that strangers will not make Serpent Measure harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Aric Fieldmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a authority broker too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open procedural doors or make them costly to ignore.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Aric Fieldmere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Aric Fieldmere always knows more about Serpent Measure than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a authority broker in Serpent Measure.
